title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises!
